item.name: User-Creation-Auth-Related
Register a new user [ADMIN] ( POST /api/auth/register )

request.description:
Generated from cURL:   curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/auth/register \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d '{
        "username": "testuser",
        "email": "testuser@example.com",
        "password": "password123",
        "roles": ["USER"]
      }'

Citizen-Related-Controller
Admin Cancels (Soft Deletes) Service Request (requires ADMIN role JWT)

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl -X DELETE http://localhost:8080/api/service-requests/1 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <JWT_TOKEN_HERE>"

item.name: Citizen Submits Service Request (requires CITIZEN role JWT)

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/service-requests \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <JWT_TOKEN_HERE>" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "serviceType": "DOCUMENT_RENEWAL",
    "description": "Requesting renewal of my National Identity Card."
  }'

item.name: Admin Submits on Behalf of Citizen (requires ADMIN role JWT and citizenId)

request.description:

  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{

    "description": "General inquiry on service procedures.",
    "citizenId": 1
  }'

item.name: Step-by-Step Execution Guide for Postman / Curl
Step 1. Login as Admin and copy the JWT token

request.description:
```
Step 1. Login as Admin and copy the JWT tokencurl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login \  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \  -d '{    "username": "admin",    "password": "adminpassword"  }'# Save response.token as <ADMIN_JWT_TOKEN>

 ```

item.name: Step 2. Register a Service Agent using the Admin token
Step 3. Create a Citizen profile using the Admin token

request.description:
``` antlr4
Step 3. Create a Citizen profile using the Admin token
# This also auto-creates a login account with username = NIC and password = NIC.
curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/citizens \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <ADMIN_JWT_TOKEN>" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "Kushan Tharaka",
    "nic": "971234567V",
    "email": "kushan@example.com",
    "mobile": "0771234567",
    "address": "123, Galle Road, Colombo",
    "status": "ACTIVE"
  }'
# Save response.id as <CITIZEN_ID>

 ```

item.name: Step 4. Login as the Citizen and copy the JWT token
Step 5. Citizen creates a service request

request.description:
```
Step 5. Citizen creates a service request
curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/service-requests \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <CITIZEN_JWT_TOKEN>" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "serviceType": "DOCUMENT_RENEWAL",
    "description": "Requesting renewal of my National Identity Card."
  }'
# Save response.id as <SERVICE_REQUEST_ID>


 ```

item.name: Step 6. Citizen checks their own service requests

request.description:
```
Step 6. Citizen checks their own service requests
curl -X GET "http://localhost:8080/api/service-requests/my?page=0&size=10" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <CITIZEN_JWT_TOKEN>"

 ```

item.name: Step 7. Citizen adds a supporting document to that service request

request.description:
```
Step 7. Citizen adds a supporting document to that service request
curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/documents \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <CITIZEN_JWT_TOKEN>" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "serviceRequestId": <SERVICE_REQUEST_ID>,
    "type": "IDENTIFICATION",
    "name": "nic-front-scan.pdf",
    "documentReference": "DOC-REF-001"
  }'
# Save response.id as <DOCUMENT_ID>


 ```

item.name: Step 8. Login as the Service Agent and copy the JWT token
Step 9. Service Agent views the service request by ID

request.description:
```
Step 9. Service Agent views the service request by ID
curl -X GET http://localhost:8080/api/service-requests/<SERVICE_REQUEST_ID> \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <SERVICE_AGENT_JWT_TOKEN>"

 ```

item.name: Step 10. Service Agent lists all documents for the service request

request.description:
```
Step 10. Service Agent lists all documents for the service request
curl -X GET http://localhost:8080/api/service-requests/<SERVICE_REQUEST_ID>/documents \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <SERVICE_AGENT_JWT_TOKEN>"


 ```

item.name: Step 11. Service Agent views the document by ID

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl -X GET http://localhost:8080/api/documents/<DOCUMENT_ID> \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <SERVICE_AGENT_JWT_TOKEN>"

item.name: Step 12. Service Agent updates service request details

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl -X PUT http://localhost:8080/api/service-requests/<SERVICE_REQUEST_ID> \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <SERVICE_AGENT_JWT_TOKEN>" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "serviceType": "DOCUMENT_RENEWAL",
    "description": "Updated by service agent for review."
  }'

item.name: Step 13. Service Agent updates service request status
Step 14. Service Agent updates full document metadata

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl -X PUT http://localhost:8080/api/documents/<DOCUMENT_ID> \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <SERVICE_AGENT_JWT_TOKEN>" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "type": "PROOF_OF_ADDRESS",
    "name": "utility-bill-june-2026.pdf",
    "documentReference": "DOC-REF-001-UPD",
    "verificationStatus": "VERIFIED"
  }'

item.name: Step 15. Service Agent updates only the document verification status
Step 16. Admin lists service requests with filters

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl -X GET "http://localhost:8080/api/service-requests?citizenId=<CITIZEN_ID>&status=IN_REVIEW&serviceType=DOCUMENT_RENEWAL&page=0&size=10" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <ADMIN_JWT_TOKEN>"

item.name: Step 17. Admin deletes the document

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl -X DELETE http://localhost:8080/api/documents/<DOCUMENT_ID> \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <ADMIN_JWT_TOKEN>"

item.name: Step 18. Admin cancels the service request

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl -X DELETE http://localhost:8080/api/service-requests/<SERVICE_REQUEST_ID> \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <ADMIN_JWT_TOKEN>"

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl -X DELETE http://localhost:8080/api/documents/<DOCUMENT_ID> \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <SERVICE_AGENT_JWT_TOKEN>"

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl -X GET http://localhost:8080/api/documents/<DOCUMENT_ID> \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <CITIZEN_JWT_TOKEN>"

request.description:

  -H "Authorization: Bearer <CITIZEN_JWT_TOKEN>"

  -H "Authorization: Bearer <CITIZEN_JWT_TOKEN>"

item.name: Step 19. Verify unauthenticated access is blocked

request.description: Generated from cURL: curl -X GET http://localhost:8080/api/auth/me

item.name: Step 7. Citizen adds a supporting document to that service request - Updated

request.description:
Generated from cURL:  curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/documents \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer <JWT_TOKEN>" \
      -F "file=@/path/to/MyNationalID.pdf" \
      -F "serviceRequestId=1" \
      -F "type=NATIONAL_ID" \
      -F "name=My National ID"

item.name: Step 24. Verify invalid JWT token is rejected

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl -X GET http://localhost:8080/api/notifications/my \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer invalid.jwt.token"

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl -X GET http://localhost:8080/api/service-requests/9999 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <CITIZEN_JWT_TOKEN>"

request.description:

  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{

    "type": "IDENTIFICATION",
    "name": "forbidden-upload.pdf",
    "documentReference": "FORBIDDEN-REF-001"
  }'
